analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet invites readers to Borrell's blog outlining principles to guide the EU amid US–China strategic competition, decoupling, and talk of a new Cold War. It frames the EU as articulating guiding principles in a complex geopolitical environment. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not supported; no reference to past successes or learning from history. EU2 (united) – not supported; no mention of EU unity or agreement. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not supported; focus is external/geostrategic, not domestic benefits. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – partially relevant: presenting principles to guide the EU in a new strategic context can imply forward-looking leadership, but the tweet doesn’t claim EU pioneering action or leadership in regulation/solutions; it’s merely an announcement to read a blog. Insufficient evidence. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not supported; no mention of rights or values leadership. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not supported; no explicit claim about EU improving global peace/cooperation. Conclusion: No listed narrative is clearly promoted.
